root_text.an4.132:1.7: ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.132:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.132:1.3: One who speaks on topic, but not fluently.
translation_text.an4.132:1.4: One who speaks fluently, but not on topic.
translation_text.an4.132:1.5: One who speaks on topic and fluently.
translation_text.an4.132:1.6: One who speaks neither on topic nor fluently.
translation_text.an4.132:1.7: These are the four individuals found in the world.”

reference_text.an4.132:1.1: csp1ed15.452, csp2ed15.452, dr21.191, ms15A4_844, msdiv132, pts-vp-pli2.135
